content:
You always miss an internship because you find out about it when its too late...

So I built something so it never happens again.

As a computer science student, the hardest part of recruiting isn't the interviews and most importantly the TIMING. By the time people find a role there are thousands of applicants that have applied for it already.

So I made a free, open source tool that fixes exactly that.

It tracks Summer 2027 and Fall 2026 Tech Internships in the US (software, data and ML). It updates itself every couple of hours so new roles are added automatically.

I do really hate signing up and getting emails, so... i made sure there are none.

It is still early in the Summer 2027 cycle, so the list will keep growing as more roles open up. I am already working on the next features, including a visa sponsorship filter for international students and instant alerts the moment a role goes live.

If you are recruiting this cycle, I hope it saves you some stress. And if you have feedback or want to contribute, I would genuinely love that.

Link:
